EmailTemplate.name: Project Kickoff Notification
EmailTemplate.subject: New Project Kicked Off: {!Project__c.Name}
EmailTemplate.body:
Hi {!Contact.FirstName},
We are pleased to inform you that project {!Project__c.Name} has officially kicked off.
Project Manager: {!User.FirstName} {!User.LastName} Expected Completion: {!Project__c.EndDate__c}
Thank you for your continued partnership.
Regards, The Project Team
